## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Validation

- [ ] `dune runtest`
- [ ] relevant smoke or terminal checks
- [ ] docs updated when public behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` reviewed when the change is release-relevant

## Impact

- [ ] no security-sensitive behavior changed
- [ ] security-sensitive behavior changed and is described below
- [ ] graph routing or agent execution behavior changed
- [ ] terminal local-ops or SSH wrapper behavior changed
- [ ] AegisLM integration or route-model behavior changed

## Notes

Call out any follow-up work, migration concerns, or known limitations.
